basic_details.job_title: Central Railway Homeopathic Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Central Railway Homeopathic Consultant Notification 2026 has been released on 29 June 2026 on the official website of Central Railway. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the Central Railway Homeopathic Consultant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 70 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree/Diploma of not less than 4 years duration with completed internship, DHMS with at least 1.5 years working experience
qualification.details: Full Time Homeopathic Consultant & Part Time Homeopathic Consultant: Degree/Diploma of not less than 4 years duration with completed internship. DHMS holders must have at least 1.5 years working experience.

salary_details.details: Full Time Homeopathic Consultant: Rs. 75000/- per month Part Time Homeopathic Consultant: Rs. 37500/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Central Railway Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.cr.indianrailways.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 21-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.central_railway: Degree/Diploma of not less than 4 years duration with completed internship, DHMS with at least 1.5 years working experience

content_sections.heading: Central Railway Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Central Railway Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Central Railway Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Central Railway Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Full Time Homeopathic Consultant & Part Time Homeopathic Consultant: Degree/Diploma of not less than 4 years duration with completed internship. DHMS holders must have at least 1.5 years working experience.

content_sections.heading: Central Railway Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 70 years for all posts.

content_sections.heading: Central Railway Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Full Time Homeopathic Consultant: Rs. 75000/- per month Part Time Homeopathic Consultant: Rs. 37500/- per month

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Central Railway Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.cr.indianrailways.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 21-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Central Railway Homeopathic Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Central Railway Homeopathic Consultant positions is 21st July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Homeopathic Consultants in Central Railway?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for Homeopathic Consultants in Central Railway, comprising one Full Time and one Part Time position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree/Diploma of at least 4 years duration with completed internship. DHMS holders need a minimum of 1.5 years of working experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Homeopathic Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Homeopathic Consultant posts is 70 years. There is no minimum age limit specified.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 37,500/- per month for Part Time Homeopathic Consultant to Rs. 75,000/- per month for Full Time Homeopathic Consultant.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an application fee for Central Railway Homeopathic Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for these posts?
faq.answer: The application process for these positions is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Homeopathic Consultant roles?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the Central Railway's official website, www.cr.indianrailways.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these Homeopathic Consultant positions?
faq.answer: The Homeopathic Consultant positions are contractual in nature.
